C:\\Users\\Nico\\tw\\plugins\\kookma\\sh.title: C:\Users\Nico\tw\plugins\kookma\shiraz\history.tid
C:\\Users\\Nico\\tw\\plugins\\kookma\\sh.text:
Full change log:  [[https://kookma.github.io/TW-Shiraz/#ChangeLog]]

* ''3.0.10'' -- 2025.07.07-- updated to TiddlyWiki 5.3.7
* ''3.0.0'' -- 2024.07.12 -- new Shiraz based on TiddlyWiki 5.3.5 and Bootstrap 5.33

---
''NOTE'': Shiraz 3.0.0 is a significant breakthrough and is not totally backward compatible. It uses Bootstrap 5.3.3, and TiddlyWiki 5.3.5 new features which is not found in earlier TiddlyWiki. It also uses new procedures with modified header.

---

* ''2.9.5'' -- 2024.06.05 -- minor bug fixes. Reverted to work with TW 5.2.7+
* ''2.9.4'' -- 2024.05.31 -- update to use some new features of 5.3.3
* ''2.7.1'' -- 2022.12.17 -- update to Tiddlywiki 5.2.4, few bug fixes
* ''2.6.9'' -- 2022.10.17 -- improved Node Explorer, and task Explorer
* ''2.6.1'' -- 2022.09.27 -- new subplug Formatter, better task manager
* ''2.5.0'' -- 2022.08.02 -- new data block, updated to Tiddlywiki 5.2.3
* ''2.4.4'' -- 2021.09.19 -- added css class for tbl-expand customization
* ''2.4.2'' -- 2021.09.10 -- quick table with bunch of column formatting
* ''2.3.3'' -- 2021.05.20 -- small bug fixes in switch palette
* ''2.3.1'' -- 2021.05.19 -- tbl-linktype template to be used for generating node-explorer
* ''2.3.0'' -- 2021.05.10 -- switch palette for dim/dark and light palette selection
* ''2.2.2'' -- 2021.04.22 -- several issues fixed for pagination, notebook and image classes
* ''2.2.0'' -- 2021.02.26 -- updated to TW 5.1.23 and pagination added to dynamic tables
* ''2.1.1'' -- 2020.03.25 -- slider macro with initial status
* ''2.1.0'' -- 2020.03.23 -- stable release on TW-5.1.22pre
* ''1.0.0'' -- 2018.10.05 -- first public release

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/aler.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/alerts
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/aler.text:
\procedure alert(type:"primary", src:"", width:"100%", class:"", mode:"block")
> class=`alert alert-$(type)$ $(class)$ $(mode)$` style=`width:$(width)$;`> <$transclude $variable="src" $mode=<>/>
\end alert \procedure alert-leftbar(type:"primary", src:"", width:"100%", class:"", mode:"block")
> class=`alert alert-$(type)$ border-$(type)$ leftbar $(class)$ $(mode)$` style=`width:$(width)$;`> <$transclude $variable="src" $mode=<>/>
\end alert-leftbar \procedure alert-border(type:"primary", src:"", width:"100%", class:"", mode:"block")
> class=`alert alert-$(type)$ border-$(type)$ $(class)$ $(mode)$` style=`width:$(width)$;`> <$transclude $variable="src" $mode=<>/>
\end alert-border

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/badg.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/badge
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/badg.text: \procedure badge(type:"primary" src:"") > class=`badge text-bg-$(type)$`><$transclude $variable="src"/> \end badge \procedure badge-pill(type:"primary" src:"") > class=`badge badge-pill text-bg-$(type)$`><$transclude $variable="src"/> \end badge-pill

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/card.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/card
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/card.text:
\procedure card(header:"", title:"", subtitle:"", text:"", footer:"", width:"100%", class:"")
> class=`card mb-3 $(class)$` style=`width:$(width)$;`> <%if [
!is[blank]] %>
<
>
<%endif%>
<%if [!is[blank]] %> <div class="h5 card-title"> <<title>> </div> <%endif%> <%if [<subtitle>!is[blank]] %> <div class="h6 card-subtitle mb-2 text-muted"> <<subtitle>> </div> <%endif%> <%if [<text>!is[blank]] %> <div class="card-text"> <<text>> </div> <%endif%> </div> <%if [<footer>!is[blank]] %> <div class="card-footer text-muted"> <<footer>> </div> <%endif%> </div> \end card

\end

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/deta.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/details
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/deta.text:
\define details(label:"", src:"", status:"", labelClass:"", srcClass:"")
<$let tv-wikilinks="no"> > class=<<__labelClass__>> ><<__label__>>
> class=<<__srcClass__>>> <%if [<__src__>has[title]] %> <$transclude $tiddler=<<__src__>> $mode="block"/> <%else%> <$transclude $variable="src" $mode="block"/> <%endif%>
\end \procedure faqs-details(filter, status:"closed", labelClass:"alert alert-secondary py-1 my-2", srcClass:"alert border-secondary py-0") \function tmpSearchTid() [[$:/temp/shiraz/qa/search-details]] [] +[join[/]] \function searchTerm() [get[text]] <$keyboard key="escape" actions='<$action-setfield $tiddler=<> $field="text" $value=""/>'> <$edit-text tiddler=<> field=text tag=input default="" placeholder="Search in titles" class="alert alert-info w-100"/> <$list filter="[subfiltersearch:title]"> <$transclude $variable=details label=<> src=<> status=<> labelClass=<> srcClass=<> /> \end faqs-details

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/imag.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/image-card
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/imag.text:
\procedure image-card(img, width:"30%", align:"none", title:"", text:"", footer:"", pos:"top", alt:"")
<%if [match[top]] %> <$image class="card-img-top" source=<> alt=<> /> <%endif%>
<%if [!is[blank]] %> <div class="h5 card-title"><<title>></div> <%endif%> <%if [<text>!is[blank]] %> <div class="card-text"><<text>></div> <%endif%> <%if [<footer>!is[blank]] %> <p class="card-text"><small class="text-muted"><<footer>></small></p> <%endif%> </div> <%if [<pos>!match[top]] %> <$image class="card-img-bottom" source=<<img>> alt=<<alt>> /> <%endif%> </div> \end image-card

<$image class="image-overlay-content-image" source=<> alt=<>/> <$set name="fdcls" filter=`$(fadein)$ +[splitbefore[ ]] +[addprefix[image-overlay-fadeIn-]]`>

<></h3> <p class="image-overlay-content-text"><<text>></p> </div> </$set> </div> </div> \end

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/procedures/sear.text:
\procedure search-box(label, tempTiddler, placeholder)
<%if [<label>!is[blank]] %>
<label class="shiraz-searchbox-label"><<label>></label>
<%endif%>
<$keyboard key="escape" actions="""<$action-deletetiddler $tiddler=<<tempTiddler>>/>""">
<$edit-text tiddler=<<tempTiddler>> field="text" tag="input" 
type="search" default="" placeholder=<<placeholder>> class="shiraz-searchbox"/>
</$keyboard>
\end search-box

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/readme.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/readme
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/readme.text:
; Shiraz
Shiraz is a small framework of stylesheets, templates and macros to create stylish contents in Tiddlywiki.  Shiraz has customized elements like alerts, cards, panels, images, static tables, dynamic tables, quick table, badges, texts, etc. Shiraz uses some modified CSS classes from [[Bootstrap|https://getbootstrap.com/]] 5.3.3.

This version is based on TiddlyWiki 5.3.5 and is not totally backward compatible. For backward compatibility use Shiraz 2.x.x like (2.9.5) and earlier.

;Code and demo
For learning plugin features, syntax, tutorial and examples see the plugin demo and code pages

* Demo: https://kookma.github.io/TW-Shiraz/
* Code: https://github.com/kookma/TW-Shiraz

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-apps
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.text:
\procedure nomenclature(id:"nomenclature", delimiter:",")
<$transclude $variable=table-csv id=<<id>> 
format="katex-inline transclude pu" class="table-borderless" 
header="no" delimiter=<<delimiter>>/>
\end

\procedure mathbox(id:"", format:"", delimiter:",")
<$transclude $variable=table-csv id=<<id>> 
format=`transclude katex $(format)$` class="table-borderless table-mathbox" 
header="no" delimiter=<<delimiter>>/>
\end

\procedure subscripts(id:"subscripts", delimiter:",")
<$transclude $variable=table-csv id=<<id>> 
format="katex-inline transclude pu" class="table-borderless" 
header="no" delimiter=<<delimiter>>/>
\end

\procedure superscripts(id:"superscripts", delimiter:",")
<$transclude $variable=table-csv id=<<id>> 
format="katex-inline transclude" class="table-borderless" 
header="no" delimiter=<<delimiter>>/>
\end

<!-- 
- These procedures use the table-csv to display nice looking outputs
- apps means application
-->

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-formats-basic
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.text: \procedure text() <$text text=<>/> \procedure code() <> \procedure transclude() <$transclude tiddler=<> field="title"/>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-formats-date
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.text:
\procedure date()       <$view field=title tiddler={{{[<entry>splitregexp[\D+]!is[blank]join[]]}}} format=date template="YYYY-0MM-0DD"/>
\procedure shortdate()  <$view field=title tiddler={{{[<entry>splitregexp[\D+]!is[blank]join[]]}}} format=date template="mmm DDth, YYYY"/>
\procedure longdate()   <$view field=title tiddler={{{[<entry>splitregexp[\D+]!is[blank]join[]]}}} format=date template="DDD, MMM 0DD, YYYY"/>

<!-- these procedures are used by table-csv to display entries -->

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-formats-math
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.text: \procedure katex() <$latex text=<> displayMode="true"> \procedure katex-inline() <$latex text=<> displayMode="false"> \procedure pu() <$latex text=`\pu{$(entry)$}` displayMode="false"> \procedure equation() <$latex text=`\begin{equation}$(entry)$\end{equation}` displayMode="true">

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-formats-misc
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.text: \procedure email() <> \procedure rate() <$list filter="[split[]match[*]]" variable=ignore> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/core/images/star-filled" /> \end

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-formats-task
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.text:
\procedure checkbox()
<%if [<entry>trim[]match[-]] %><!-- show task item -->
	<input type=checkbox disabled/>
<%elseif [<entry>trim[]match[x]] %><!-- show done item -->
	<input type=checkbox checked disabled/>
<%endif%>
\end checkbox

\procedure todo-action(param)
<!-- toggle a line done (x) / undone (-) . the lbr is used to prevent replace "x, Hi" with "x, Hi Jeremy"-->
<$let lbr="
" 
in=  {{{ [<row>addsuffix<lbr>] }}}
out= {{{ [<row>splitregexp<delimiter>rest[]join<delimiter>addprefix<delimiter>addprefix<param>addsuffix<lbr>]}}} >
    <$action-setfield $tiddler=<<src>> text={{{ [<src>get[text]search-replace:g:<in>,<out>] }}}/>
</$let>	
\end

\procedure todo()
<%if [<entry>trim[]match[-]] %><!-- show task item -->
	<$button class="tc-btn-invisible" actions="""<<todo-action "x">>"""><input type=checkbox/></$button>
<%elseif [<entry>trim[]match[x]] %><!-- show done item -->
	<$button class="tc-btn-invisible" actions="""<<todo-action "-">>"""><input type=checkbox checked/></$button>
<%endif%>
\end todo

<!-- these procedures are used by table-csv to display entries 
Pay attention to the triple quotes around """<<todo-action "x">>""".
These quotes are mandatory; if they are removed, the attribute won’t be passed correctly.”
-->

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-header-template
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.text:
<th>
<%if [<tempTableSort>getindex[sortIndex]match<currentColumn>] %><!--if table is sorted based on current column -->
	<%if [<tempTableSort>getindex[hasnegate]match[false]] %><!--set negate for sort-->
		<$button setTitle=<<tempTableSort>> setIndex="hasnegate" setTo="true" class="tbl-sort-svg tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" >
			<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableSort>> $index="negate" $value="reverse"/>
			<$transclude $tiddler=<<currentColumn>> $field=title $mode=inline/> {{$:/core/images/down-arrow}}
		</$button>
	<%elseif [<tempTableSort>getindex[hasnegate]match[true]] %><!--remove negate for sort-->
		<$button setTitle=<<tempTableSort>> setIndex="hasnegate" setTo="false" class="tbl-sort-svg tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" >
			<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableSort>> $index="negate" $value=""/>
			<$transclude $tiddler=<<currentColumn>> $field=title $mode=inline/> {{$:/core/images/up-arrow}}
		</$button>
	<%endif%><!-- end of nested if: set negate -->
<%else%><!--if table is not sorted based on current column -->
	<$button setTitle=<<tempTableSort>> setIndex="sortIndex" setTo=<<currentColumn>> class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" >
		<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableSort>> $index="hasnegate" $value="false"/>
		<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableSort>> $index="negate" $value=""/>
		<$transclude $tiddler=<<currentColumn>> $field=title $mode=inline/>
	</$button>
<%endif%>
</th>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-table-csv
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct.text:
\procedure table-csv(tiddler:"", delimiter:",", sortType:"alphanumeric", format:"", caption:"", class:"", header:"yes", stateTiddler:"", id:"", dclass:"dblock" ) \whitespace trim \import [all[tiddlers+shadows]prefix[$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-formats]!is[draft]] <$let src = {{{ [is[tiddler]else] }}} stateTiddler = {{{ [!is[blank]else[01]] }}} tempTableSort= {{{ "$:/state/tablecsv/$(currentTiddler)$/$(stateTiddler)$" :and[substitute[]] }}} sortCol = {{{ [getindex[sortIndex]] }}} sortNegate = {{{ [getindex[negate]] }}} delimiter = {{{ [prefix[\]]:filter[length[]match[2]] :else[escaperegexp[]] }}} dataBlockStartDelimiter =`${[is[blank]then[@@.$(dclass)$]] :else[[@@.$(dclass)$.]addsuffix]}$` dataBlockEndDelimiter = "@@" > <$let dblock0 = {{{ [get[text]splitregexpbutfirst[1]] }}} dblock = {{{ [splitregexpbutlast[1]] }}} allRows = "[splitregexp[\n]!is[blank]]" header_row ={{{ [
match[yes]then[1]else[0]] }}} > > > <%if [ <%endif%> <%if [
match[yes]] %>
<$list filter="[subfilterfirst[]]" variable=row > <$list filter="[splitregexp!is[blank]trim[]]" variable=currentColumn> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/ct-header-template" /> <%endif%> <$let sortPos = {{{ [subfilterfirstsplitregexp!is[blank]trim[]] +[allbefore:includecount[]] }}} sortType = {{{ [enlist:rawnthelse[alphanumeric]] }}} mainFilter = {{{ "[subfilterbutfirst] :sort:$(sortType)$:$(sortNegate)$[split!is[blank]trim[]nth]" :and[substitute[]] }}} > <$list filter=<> variable=row> <$list filter="[splitregexp!is[blank]trim[]]" variable=entry counter=pos>
!is[blank]] %> <$transclude $variable=<>/>
<$transclude $variable={{{ [enlist:rawnthelse[text]] }}} />
\end table-csv

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt-confirm-delete
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.text:
\procedure confirm-delete()
<%if [[$:/temp/dynamictables/delete-all-records]has:index<currentTable>] %><!-- reveals deletion confirmation -->
<tr class="tbl-delete-confirm">
<th colspan=<<columnsCount>> >
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/dynamictables/delete-all-records]getindex<currentTable>match[delete-confirmed]]" 
  variable=ignore emptyMessage=<<ask-for-delete>> >
  <<perform-delete>>
</$list>
</th>
</tr>
<%endif%>
\end

\procedure ask-for-delete()
	\whitespace notrim
	Delete all <$count filter="[subfilter<inputFilter>]"/> records?
	<$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="mark for delete" actions='<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/temp/dynamictables/delete-all-records" $index=<<currentTable>> $value="delete-confirmed"/>'>
		{{$:/core/images/delete-button}} yes
	</$button> or 
	<$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="cancel delete" actions='<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/temp/dynamictables/delete-all-records" $index=<<currentTable>>/>'>
		{{$:/core/images/close-button}} no
	</$button>
\end

<!--actions for perform-delete button-->
\procedure delete-all-records-action() 
	\import $:/plugins/kookma/trashbin/macros/move-to-trashbin
	<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/temp/dynamictables/delete-all-records" $index=<<currentTable>>/>
	<$action-deletetiddler $filter="[prefix<tempTable>]"/><!-- delete all states related to current table-->
	<%if [[$:/plugins/kookma/trashbin]is[missing]] %>
		<$action-deletetiddler $filter=<<inputFilter>> /><!--delete permanently-->
	<%else%>
		<$list filter=<<inputFilter>> variable="currentRecord"><!-- move all to trashbin -->
			<$transclude $variable="move-to-trashbin" tiddler=<<currentRecord>> />
		</$list>
	<%endif%>
\end		 

\procedure perform-delete()
\whitespace notrim
	Warning! this action cannot be undone!
	<$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="delete all records or move to trashbin" actions=<<delete-all-records-action>> >
		{{$:/core/images/delete-button}}  delete 
	</$button> or 
	<$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="cancel the operation" actions='<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/temp/dynamictables/delete-all-records" $index=<<currentTable>>/>'>
		{{$:/core/images/close-button}} cancel 
	</$button>
\end

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt-helper
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.text:
\procedure baseState()        $:/state/dynamictables
\procedure persistantState()  $:/keepstate/dynamictables

\function keepstate()       [[$(persistantState)$/$(currentTable)$]substitute[]]

\function stateTableFooter() [[$(keepstate)$/footer]substitute[]]
\function stateWarningMsg()  [[$(keepstate)$/warning]substitute[]]

\function pageStateTiddler()          [[$(keepstate)$/page-number]substitute[]]
\function entryPerPageStateTiddler()  [[$(keepstate)$/entry-per-page]substitute[]]



<!-- 
 Those tiddlers based on keepstate are permanent.
 These are tiddlers hold the data and setting for footer, styles and warning (needs to be hold).
 These state and temporary tiddlers are independent of currentTiddler (host tiddler) and on changing
 the title of host tiddler will not disconnected to table
-->

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt-maths
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.text:
\function count()       [<dataType>match[field]] :then[subfilter<inputFilter>get<currentColumn>count[]]   :else[subfilter<inputFilter>getindex<currentColumn>count[]]
\function average(pn:0) [<dataType>match[field]] :then[subfilter<inputFilter>get<currentColumn>average[]]:else[subfilter<inputFilter>getindex<currentColumn>average[]] :and[fixed<pn>]
\function median(pn:0)  [<dataType>match[field]] :then[subfilter<inputFilter>get<currentColumn>median[]] :else[subfilter<inputFilter>getindex<currentColumn>median[]]  :and[fixed<pn>]

\function sum(pn:0)     [<dataType>match[field]] :then[subfilter<inputFilter>get<currentColumn>sum[]]     :else[subfilter<inputFilter>getindex<currentColumn>sum[]]     :and[fixed<pn>]
\function product(pn:0) [<dataType>match[field]] :then[subfilter<inputFilter>get<currentColumn>product[]] :else[subfilter<inputFilter>getindex<currentColumn>product[]] :and[fixed<pn>]

\function minall(pn:0) [<dataType>match[field]] :then[subfilter<inputFilter>get<currentColumn>minall[]]   :else[subfilter<inputFilter>getindex<currentColumn>minall[]]  :and[fixed<pn>]
\function maxall(pn:0) [<dataType>match[field]] :then[subfilter<inputFilter>get<currentColumn>maxall[]]   :else[subfilter<inputFilter>getindex<currentColumn>maxall[]]  :and[fixed<pn>]

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt-pagination
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.text: \procedure prev-button() <$list filter="[compare:number:lt[2]then[yes]else[no]]" variable=state> <$button disabled=<> class="shiraz-dtable-page-prev tc-btn-invisible"> {{$:/core/images/chevron-left}} Prev <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field=text $subfilter="+[subtract[1]] ~[[1]]"/> \end \procedure next-button() <$list filter="[compare:number:gteqthen[yes]else[no]]" variable=state> <$button disabled=<> class="shiraz-dtable-page-next tc-btn-invisible"> Next {{$:/core/images/chevron-right}} <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field=text $subfilter="+[add[1]] ~[[2]]"/> \end \procedure limit-entries() <$select tiddler=<> default=25 actions="""<$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text=1/>"""> <$list filter='5 10 15 20 25 30 40 50' variable=num> \end

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt-show-edit-cell
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.text: \procedure show-cell() <%if [match[field]] %> <$transclude tiddler=<> field=<> mode="inline" /> <%else%> <$transclude tiddler=<> index=<> mode="inline" /> <%endif%> \end \procedure edit-cell() <%if [match[field]] %> <$edit-text tiddler=<> field=<> tag="input" class="shiraz-dtable-textbox"/> <%else%> <$edit-text tiddler=<> index=<> tag="input" class="shiraz-dtable-textbox"/> <%endif%> \end \procedure show-cell-locked() <> \end

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt-table-dynamic
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.text:
\procedure table-dynamic(filter, fields:"", indexes:"", sortType:"string", caption:"", class:"", footerRows:"0", stateTiddler:"", editButton:"yes", pagination:"no", emptyMessage:"filter input is empty") \import [all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/Table/Procedure]!is[draft]] <$let inputFilter="[subfilter!has[draft.of]]" > <%if [subfilterlimit[1]] %> <$let dataType = {{{ [!is[blank]then[field]] [!is[blank]then[index]] +[last[]] }}} coulmnFilter = {{{ [match[field]thenelse] }}} columnsCount = {{{ [subfiltercount[]] }}} currentTable = {{{ [!is[blank]else] }}} tempTable = {{{ [][] +[join[/]] }}} tempTableSort = {{{ [] "sortby" +[join[/]] }}} tempTableExpand = {{{ [] "expand" +[join[/]] }}} tempTableEdit = {{{ [] "edit-view-status" +[join[/]] }}} sortIndex = {{{ [getindex[sortIndex]] }}} sortFlag = {{{ [getindex[sortFlag]] }}} >
> class="tbl-container" style="max-width:100%;"> > style="caption-side:top"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/segments/dt-thead"/> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/segments/dt-tbody"/> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/segments/dt-tfoot"/>
<%if [match[yes]] %> <> <%endif%> <$transclude $variable="caption"/>
<%else%> <$transclude $variable="emptyMessage" /> <%endif%> \end

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt-toggle-edit-view
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.text:
\procedure toggle-edit-view()
\procedure clear-mark-for-delete() 	<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/temp/dynamictables/delete-all-records" $index=<<currentTable>>/>
<%if [<tempTableEdit>getindex[mode]match[edit]] %>
<$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" setTitle=<<tempTableEdit>> setIndex="mode" setTo="view" actions=<<clear-mark-for-delete>> >{{$:/core/images/done-button}}</$button>
<%else%>
<$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" setTitle=<<tempTableEdit>> setIndex="mode" setTo="edit">{{$:/core/images/edit-button}}</$button>
<%endif%>
\end
<!--clear-mark-for-delete
clears the status of currentTable if it is marked to be deleted
-->

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/procs/dt-warning-message

\function mixedtype.criteria() [subfilter!type[application/x-tiddler-dictionary]!type[application/json]] \procedure show_tiddler_types()

Tiddlers with wrong type:
    <$list filter="[mixedtype.criteria[]]" >
  • <$link/> (type: <$view field=type/>)
\end show_tiddler_types \procedure dismissButton() <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" style="fill:white;" tooltip="Dismiss alert and continue with the current selection!"> {{$:/core/images/close-button}} <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="dissmiss"/> \end dismissButton \procedure check_tiddlers_type_for_table_from_indexes() <%if [match[index]] [match[yes]] :and[count[]match[2]] %> <%if [mixedtype.criteria[]limit[1]] [is[missing]] :and[count[]match[2]] %> > > ''Danger'': Editable dynamic tables created from indexes with mixed types of tiddlers. <> <> <%endif%> <%endif%> \end check_tiddlers_type_for_table_from_indexes

<%endif%> <%else%> {{||$:/core/ui/ViewTemplate/body}} <%endif%> \end display-expanded-record \procedure display-one-record() \function tbl-row-class() [get[status]match[complete]then[tbl-record-complete]] > > <$list filter=<> variable=currentColumn> <$set name="bodyLookup" filter="[all[tiddlers+shadows]tag[$:/tags/Table/BodyTemplate]!is[draft]contains:tbl-column-list] +[limit[1]get[title]]" value=<> emptyValue="$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/body/default"> <$transclude tiddler=<> field="text" mode="inline"/> <%if [getindexmatch[show]] %> <> <%endif%> \end display-one-record <$let total-entries={{{ [subfiltercount[]] }}} page-number= {{{ [get[text]] ~[[1]] }}} entries-per-page= {{{ [get[text]] ~[[25]] }}} low= {{{ [subtract[1]multiply] }}} high= {{{ [multiply] }}} > <$transclude $variable="generate-table-body-rows" /> <%if [match[yes]] %> > > <> Displaying <$text text={{{[add[1]]}}}/> through <$text text={{{ [compare:number:ltthenelse] }}}/> of <> Results | <> <> <%endif%>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.text: \procedure delete-record() <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-delete-tiddler" $param=<>/> \procedure move-record-to-trashbin() \import $:/plugins/kookma/trashbin/macros/move-to-trashbin <$macrocall $name="move-to-trashbin" tiddler=<> /> \end <%if [getindex[mode]match[edit]] %> <$let doDelete= {{{ [[$:/plugins/kookma/trashbin]!is[missing]then[move-record-to-trashbin]else[delete-record]] }}} > <$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="delete this record or move it to trash" aria-label="" actions='<$transclude $variable=<>/>' > {{$:/core/images/delete-button}} <%endif%>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/body/tbl-expand

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/footer/tbl-delete

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/footer/tbl-expand
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/header/default
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.text:
<th>
<%if [<tempTableSort>getindex[sortIndex]match<currentColumn>] %><!--if table is sorted based on current column -->
	<%if [<tempTableSort>getindex[hasnegate]match[false]] %><!--set negate for sort-->
		<$button setTitle=<<tempTableSort>> setIndex="hasnegate" setTo="true" class="tbl-sort-svg tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" >
			<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableSort>> $index="sortFlag" $value="reverse,caseinsensitive"/>
			<$text text=<<currentColumn>>/> {{$:/core/images/down-arrow}}
		</$button>
	<%elseif [<tempTableSort>getindex[hasnegate]match[true]] %><!--remove negate for sort-->
		<$button setTitle=<<tempTableSort>> setIndex="hasnegate" setTo="false" class="tbl-sort-svg tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" >
			<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableSort>> $index="sortFlag" $value=""/>
			<$text text=<<currentColumn>>/> {{$:/core/images/up-arrow}}
		</$button>
	<%endif%><!-- end of nested if: set negate -->
<%else%><!--if table is not sorted based on current column -->
	<$button setTitle=<<tempTableSort>> setIndex="sortIndex" setTo=<<currentColumn>> class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" >
		<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableSort>> $index="hasnegate" $value="false"/>
		<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableSort>> $index="sortFlag" $value=""/>
		<$text text=<<currentColumn>>/>
	</$button>
<%endif%>
</th>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/header/tbl-checkbox
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.text:
\procedure chk-checkactions()
<$list filter="[subfilter<inputFilter>]" variable="currentRecord">
	<$action-listops  $tiddler=<<currentRecord>> $tags="+[append[Done]]" />
	<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<currentRecord>> status="complete"/>
</$list>
\end
\procedure chk-uncheckactions()
<$list filter="[subfilter<inputFilter>]" variable="currentRecord">
	<$action-listops  $tiddler=<<currentRecord>> $tags="+[remove[Done]]" />
	<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<currentRecord>> status="rework"/>
</$list>
\end

<th class="shiraz-dtable-svg">
<$checkbox checkactions=<<chk-checkactions>> uncheckactions=<<chk-uncheckactions>> />
</th>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/header/tbl-clone
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.text: \procedure clone-all-records() <$list filter="[subfilter]" variable="currentRecord"> <$action-createtiddler $basetitle=<> $template=<> /> <$list> \end <%if [getindex[mode]match[edit]] %> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip={{$:/language/Buttons/Clone/Hint}} aria-label={{$:/language/Buttons/Clone/Caption}} actions=<> > {{$:/core/images/clone-button}} <%endif%>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/header/tbl-delete
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.text: \procedure mark-for-delete() <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/temp/dynamictables/delete-all-records" $index=<> $value="to-be-deleted"/> <%if [getindex[mode]match[edit]] %> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="delete all records or move them to trashbin" aria-label="" actions=<> > {{$:/core/images/delete-button}} <%endif%>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/templates/header/tbl-expand
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/tables/template.text:
\procedure collapse-all-expanded() <$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tempTableExpand>> text=""/>
<th class="shiraz-dtable-svg">
	<%if [<tempTableExpand>indexes[]limit[1]] %>
		<$button class="tc-btn-invisible" actions=<<collapse-all-expanded>> >
			{{$:/core/images/fold-button}}
		</$button>
	<%endif%>
</th>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel/Settings
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel.caption: Shiraz
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel.text:
\procedure dynamictables-editortype() $:/config/shiraz/dynamictables/editor-type
\procedure configTiddler() $:/config/Shiraz

These settings let you customise the behaviour of Shiraz plugin.

---

; Show Shiraz setting in more sidebar

: <$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel/Settings" 
tag="$:/tags/MoreSideBar"> 
Show setting in more sidebar
</$checkbox>

; Options

: <$checkbox tiddler=<<configTiddler>> 
index="colorify-ui-buttons" checked="yes"> 
Colorify UI buttons
</$checkbox>

: <$checkbox tiddler=<<configTiddler>>
index="view-toolbar-buttons-visibility" checked="yes"> 
Hide tiddler's view toolbar and show on mouse hover
</$checkbox>

: <$checkbox tiddler=<<configTiddler>>
index="colorify-sidebar-active-tab" checked="yes"> 
Colorify active sidebar tab
</$checkbox>

; Set dark and light palettes

{{$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel/switch-palette}}

; Breadcrumbs

{{$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel/breadcrumbs}}

---

; Choose Local Editor for Dynamic Table

: <$checkbox tiddler=<<dynamictables-editortype>> field="text" 
checked="main-editor" unchecked="simple-textarea" default="simple-textarea"> 
Use Tiddlywiki main editor 
</$checkbox>

: <$checkbox tiddler=<<dynamictables-editortype>> field="text" 
checked="simple-textarea" unchecked="main-editor" default="simple-textarea"> 
Use simple text area 
</$checkbox>

$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel.title: $:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel/switch-palette
$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz/ui/ControlPanel.text: \procedure configTiddler() $:/config/Shiraz \function f.day() [all[tiddlers+shadows]tag[$:/tags/Palette]] :filter[get[color-scheme]match[light]] \function f.night() [all[tiddlers+shadows]tag[$:/tags/Palette]] :filter[get[color-scheme]match[dark]] \procedure selectPalette(title, filter, default, index)
